content:
## Hotel access policy
After hours, guests must badge in at the Main Lobby. Elevator lobby doors auto-lock at 23:00. Room key required for gym and pool areas.

## Emergency exits
Clearly marked stairwell exits on all floors may be used anytime; alarms sound locally.

# AV — HDMI handshake loss
Symptoms: black screen despite source power. Steps:
1. Reseat HDMI at display and podium matrix (cold pull, wait 3s).
2. Force source resolution to 1080p if auto-negotiation loops.
3. If persists, failover to VGA/DP backup input and note matrix port in incident.

## Catering loads
Temporary circuits for warmers draw up to 3kW; must not plug into housekeeping quad boxes. Dedicated drop from panel **H2** only; Facilities must energize breaker **H2-B** before load-in.
